channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: The Executive Is the New Perimeter
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: A board-level analysis of active SharePoint exploitation, executive-targeted social engineering, and why attackers increasingly treat leadership itself as privileged infrastructure.
